generic_academic.description: Default native-English academic style for journals without a verified family mapping.

pnas_broad.description: Broad-interest biological and biomedical research with concise significance framing.

elife_bio.description: Mechanistic life-science writing with transparent claims and accessible logic.

plos_bmc_open.description: Clear open-science style for accessible biomedical reporting.

clinical_high_impact.description: Clinically oriented writing with cautious claims and patient-impact framing.

nature_like.description: Broad-interest positioning; uses generic profile until a verified family profile is trained.

cell_like.description: Mechanistic biological storytelling; uses eLife seed profile until a dedicated family is trained.

methods_bioinformatics.description: Method-focused manuscripts where reproducibility and technical clarity dominate.

review_narrative.description: Review-article synthesis style controlled primarily by article_type=review.

case_report_clinical.description: Clinical case-report style controlled primarily by article_type=case_report.
